dialogue_text: Who are you and whence came you?
source_excerpt: "Who are you and whence came you?" he cried.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: I am an air scout, friend, and very near a dead one, for just by the merest chance I escaped falling to the avenue below,
source_excerpt: "I am an air scout, friend, and very near a dead one, for just by the merest chance I escaped falling to the avenue below," I replied.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: But how came you upon the roof, man? No one has landed or come up from the building for the past hour. Quick, explain yourself, or I call the guard.
source_excerpt: "But how came you upon the roof, man? No one has landed or come up from the building for the past hour. Quick, explain yourself, or I call the guard."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: Look you here, sentry, and you shall see how I came and how close a shave I had to not coming at all,
source_excerpt: "Look you here, sentry, and you shall see how I came and how close a shave I had to not coming at all," I answered, turning toward the edge of the roof, where, twenty feet below, at the end of my strap, hung all my weapons.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
